title_cn: 欧洲热浪成为中国便携式空调制造商的亮点
summary: As heat records shattered across Europe in the last weeks of June and indoor temperatures rose to uncomfortable levels, many of the continent’s residents sought immediate relief in the form of portable air conditioner units.

title: Mamoon Hamid on Learning from Startups
title_cn: Mamoon Hamid 谈向初创公司学习
summary: Barry sits down with Kleiner Perkins Partner, Mamoon Hamid. They discuss Mamoon's thoughts on the AI revolution and his approach to early AI investing.  Mamoon also breaks down how he became an early investor in giants like Slack, Figma, and how Kleiner Perkins assesses the investments they missed.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ondas to Buy Autonomous Aircraft Maker DZYNE for $875.8 Million
title_cn: Ondas 将以 8.758 亿美元收购自主飞机制造商 DZYNE
summary: Ondas Inc. agreed to buy autonomous aircraft maker DZYNE Technologies in an $875.8 million cash-and stock-deal that positions Ondas as a full-service autonomous defense technology platform.

title_cn: 尽管高盛警告供应将加速反弹，铝价仍上涨
summary: Aluminum rose from near a four-month low, even as Goldman Sachs Group Inc. warned that supply from Middle Eastern smelters is rebounding more quickly than expected.

title_cn: 假期结束后科技股提振美国股指期货：市场总结
summary: US futures signaled a bounce in technology stocks at the start of a week in which South Korea’s memory giants will put the artificial-intelligence trade to yet another test.

summary: Until now, it has been difficult, if not impossible, for American investors to bet on SK Hynix.

title_cn: 套利交易者在新兴市场押注中放弃美元
summary: Emerging-market traders are increasingly turning to currencies from the euro to the Australian dollar to fund bets in the developing world as the US dollar roars back.

title: Sara Duterte Faces Impeachment Trial With Philippine Presidential Dream At Stake
title_cn: 萨拉·杜特尔特面临弹劾审判，菲律宾总统梦想岌岌可危
summary: Philippine Vice President Sara Duterte faces a contentious trial in the Senate, a case that could end her political career or leave her as the top contender to succeed archrival Ferdinand Marcos Jr. as president.

title: EasyJet’s Stock Shows Castlelake Bid May Be Far From a Slam Dunk
title_cn: 易捷航空的股票显示卡斯尔莱克的出价可能还远未成功
summary: Castlelake LP’s latest bid to buy EasyJet Plc reached £6.90 per share in cash, but the UK airline is trading below that even with Monday’s post-announcement bump, signaling investors may be concerned about the potential regulatory and political barriers facing the £5 billion-plus deal.

title: The Investors Scrambling to Keep SpaceX - and Elon Musk - Out of Their Portfolios
title_cn: 投资者争先恐后地将 SpaceX 和埃隆·马斯克排除在投资组合之外
summary: Christopher Bejnar has spent the last couple of months combing through the fine print of exchange-traded funds, emailing financial advisers and moving money into European stocks – all to keep SpaceX out of his $1 million portfolio.

title: Samsung High-Stakes Results to Set Mood for Chip Stock Bulls
title_cn: 三星高风险业绩为芯片股看涨情绪奠定基础
summary: A wild ride for global chip stocks in recent weeks has left investors looking for fresh validation of the artificial intelligence trade. Samsung Electronics Co. may provide just that on Tuesday.

title: Canadians Skeptical of Carney’s Push to Open Airports to Private Investment
title_cn: 加拿大人对卡尼推动向私人投资开放机场持怀疑态度
summary: A slim majority of Canadians oppose allowing private investment in airports, a new poll shows, as Prime Minister Mark Carney explores selling stakes in the publicly owned facilities to unlock funding for major infrastructure projects.

title: Citi Joins Small Group of Banks Running London’s Gold Vaults
title_cn: 花旗加入运营伦敦金库的银行小集团
summary: Citigroup Inc. has joined the small group of banks that provide the vaulting and clearing services that underpin the gold market in London, the world’s biggest bullion-trading center.

title: Gold Falls After Weekly Gain as Rate-Hike Concerns Recede
title_cn: 由于加息担忧消退，金价在每周上涨后下跌
summary: Gold dropped after posting its first weekly advance since May on weakening expectations that the US Federal Reserve will hike interest rates.

title: The Tanker Tycoon Making Millions on Hormuz Shuttle Runs
title_cn: 油轮大亨通过霍尔木兹航天飞机赚取数百万美元
summary: Just a few weeks into the war, one of the Persian Gulf’s top oil producers quietly began sneaking its crude out of the Strait of Hormuz. Before long, the covert project became so successful that the United Arab Emirates was already approaching its pre-war rate of flows through the waterway by the time the US and Iran signed their interim peace deal.

title: Hungary Selling First Eurobond to Harvest Post-Orban Rally
title_cn: 匈牙利出售第一笔欧洲债券以收获欧尔班后的反弹
summary: Hungary is selling its first international bond since Viktor Orban’s ouster in April’s watershed election triggered a plunge in borrowing costs.

title: Options Flash Bearish Yen Signal as Tokyo Stays on the Sidelines
title_cn: 东京持观望态度，期权闪现看跌日元信号
summary: The options market is sending a bearish signal on the yen, with interest-rate differentials remaining firmly in favor of the dollar and the Japanese authorities avoiding intervention for now.

title: Morgan Stanley’s Wilson Sees Rotation From Chips to Hyperscalers
title_cn: 摩根士丹利的威尔逊认为从芯片到超大规模的转变
summary: US stocks will struggle to reach new highs as investors rotate out of some of this year’s biggest winning technology trades, according to Morgan Stanley strategists.

title: Stalled AI Rally Has More Eyeing Old-Guard Stocks, Markets Pulse Survey Says
title_cn: 市场脉搏调查显示，停滞的人工智能涨势吸引了更多关注的老牌股票
summary: Growing doubts about sustainability of the AI rally are pushing more investors toward old-economy stocks, according to the latest Markets Pulse survey.

title: Are SpaceX and Tesla Hurtling Toward a Merger?
title_cn: SpaceX 和特斯拉正在加速合并吗？
summary: There’s growing speculation that Elon Musk will combine his two biggest companies.

title: Taiwan Authorities Search Evergreen Marine Premises
title_cn: 台湾当局搜查长荣海事处所
summary: Taipei prosecutors and the Investigation Bureau searched Evergreen Marine Corp.’s premises on Monday morning as part of a probe into suspected insider trading, according to multiple media reports.

title: Intrum Returns to Europe’s Junk Bond Market After Equity Raise
title_cn: Intrum 融资后重返欧洲垃圾债券市场
summary: Swedish debt collector Intrum AB is back in Europe’s high-yield bond market for the first time since a sharp jump in financing costs forced it into a restructuring.

title: Ocado CEO Steiner to Step Down in 2028 After Board Tussle
title_cn: Ocado 首席执行官 Steiner 将于 2028 年在董事会之争后辞职
summary: Ocado Group Plc Chief Executive Office Tim Steiner will step down at the start of its 2028 financial year, following a boardroom tussle at the British online grocery delivery company mired in a stock slump.

title: Oil Fluctuates as Hormuz Flows Continue
title_cn: 霍尔木兹水流持续，石油波动
summary: Oil swung in a narrow range as flows through the Strait of Hormuz persisted and OPEC+ signaled higher supplies. Bloomberg's Stephen Stapczynski reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: South African Businesses Bet on Renewables
title_cn: 南非企业押注可再生能源
summary: Businesses in South Africa are investing in renewable energy to protect against rolling blackouts and steep price increases from state-owned power utility Eskom Holdings. Bloomberg's Jennifer Zabasajja reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Goldman Cuts Yen Forecast to 165 Per Dollar, Likes Carry Trades
title_cn: 高盛将日元预测下调至1美元兑165日元，喜欢套利交易
summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. sees the yen weakening to 165 per dollar in a year’s time, driven in part by Japan’s interest rate differentials with the US.

title_cn: 三星盈利对韩国牛市至关重要：3 分钟 MLIV
summary: Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson, Tom Mackenzie and Paul Dobson break down today's key themes for analysts and investors on "Bloomberg: The Opening Trade."  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: These Are the Sharps Actually Making Money on Prediction Markets
title_cn: 这些是真正在预测市场上赚钱的人
summary: What it takes to win on Kalshi and Polymarket.

title: Odd Lots: The Sharps Who Dominate Prediction Markets (Podcast)
title_cn: 奇怪的群体：主导预测市场的锐利者（播客）
summary: Here’s a couple things about prediction markets. A lot of it is pure gambling and speculation, much of it on things with very little economic relevance. Another fact is that in all likelihood, if you yourself started trading right now, you’d probably lose your shirt. But there is money being made by some dedicated traders, really focused on areas like politics and economics. On this episode, we speak with Brian Golden and Daniel Reichman, who are part of a private Discord called MAGA Kiwi Club,

title: Japan Former FX Czar: Yen Undervalued by Up to 20%
title_cn: 日本前外汇沙皇：日元被低估高达20%
summary: The yen should be as much as 20% stronger than it is, said former top foreign exchange official in Japan Tatsuo Yamasaki. He spoke in an exclusive interview with Bloomberg’ Shery Ahn in Tokyo. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Goldman Sachs Sees Yen at 165 per Dollar in 12 Months
title_cn: 高盛预计 12 个月内日元兑美元汇率将达到 165
summary: Kamakshya Trivedi, head of global FX and interest rates at Goldman Sachs, discusses the firm's forecast for the yen which it has revised to 165 per dollar in a year’s time from 155. "I think the undervaluation that you're seeing on the yen is really historic," Trivedi tells Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sony’s All-Digital PlayStation Strategy Doesn’t Sit Well With Gamers
title_cn: 索尼的全数字 PlayStation 策略并不适合游戏玩家
summary: The former champion of sharing-friendly policies has changed

title: Memory Chipmaker SK Hynix Kicks Off $28 Billion US Listing
title_cn: 存储芯片制造商 SK Hynix 启动 280 亿美元美国上市
summary: SK Hynix Inc. kicked off its formal marketing process for its US listing on Monday, as the South Korean chipmaker looks to capitalize on surging investor demand for the high-flying memory-chip sector.

title: ITV to Sell Broadcasting Unit to Sky for Up to £1.6 Billion
title_cn: ITV 将以高达 16 亿英镑的价格将广播部门出售给 Sky
summary: ITV Plc has agreed to sell its media and entertainment arm to Comcast Corp.-owned Sky Group Ltd. in a deal worth as much as £1.6 billion ($2.1 billion) including debt, a move that will reshape the UK television industry.

title: Standard Bank Warns of Flight From Sovereign Debt as Safety Ebbs
title_cn: 标准银行警告称，随着安全形势的恶化，人们将逃离主权债务
summary: Investors seeking to insulate their portfolios against turbulence should increasingly look beyond government bonds, which appear to be losing their traditional safe-haven status, according to Standard Bank’s head of G10 strategy.

title: Ready for the Future, Ireland Is Also Vulnerable to It
title_cn: 为未来做好准备，爱尔兰也很容易受到影响
summary: Ireland may be a bellwether for how an economy can bet its future on technology and lose.

title: South Korea's SK Hynix, Samsung to Put AI Trade to the Test | The Pulse 7/6/2026
title_cn: 韩国 SK 海力士、三星将考验人工智能贸易 |脉搏 7/6/2026
summary:
South Korea’s memory giants will put the artificial-intelligence trade to yet another test this week. Samsung releases earnings on Tuesday. Investors are also getting ready for SK Hynix’s massive US listing days later.

Eleven people were killed and 60 injured in a deadly overnight attack in the Ukrainian capital, Kyiv, on the eve of the NATO summit in Ankara where President Donald Trump is due to meet with Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy.

Shares in UK budget carrier EasyJet soared after it agreed in principle to a takeover offer of more than £5 billion from US firm Castlelake. The bid was Castlelake’s fifth, after the two sides sparred over several weeks.

Today's guests: Monica Defend, Amundi Investment Institute Head; Elisabeth Braw, Atlantic Council Senior Fellow (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Singapore Files New Charges in Nvidia Chip Fraud Case
title_cn: 新加坡对 Nvidia 芯片欺诈案提出新指控
summary: Singaporean prosecutors filed additional charges including money laundering against a key suspect in an AI server fraud case, part of the Southeast Asian nation’s growing efforts to clamp down on Nvidia Corp. chips being diverted illicitly to other locations including China.

title: Amundi Says European Industrials to Benefit From AI Boom
title_cn: Amundi 表示欧洲工业将受益于人工智能热潮
summary: Amundi Investment Institute Head Monica Defend explains where she sees value in the AI supply chain. "Industrial is going to be a key sector because of its weight on on the market and because this is the sector where we have the AI enablers," Defend tells Bloomberg Television. "This is where we think the value and the performance might come from." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ireland's US-Exposed Tech Sector Faces AI Job Disruption
title_cn: 爱尔兰受美国影响的科技行业面临人工智能就业中断
summary: Ireland's technology sector, heavily exposed to US multinationals, is facing widespread AI-driven labor market disruption and declines in its high tech employment rates. Bloomberg's Olivia Fletcher has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia Supplier Unimicron Seeks $1.4 Billion in GDS Offer
title_cn: Nvidia 供应商欣兴电子寻求 14 亿美元的 GD​​S 报价
summary: Unimicron Technology Corp. is seeking as much as $1.4 billion from a sale of global depositary shares, according to terms of the deal seen by Bloomberg News, capitalizing on an artificial-intelligence frenzy that has lifted the Taiwanese chip supplier’s stock more than 700% over the past 12 months.

title: Apple Supplier Luxshare Said to Plan Pricing HK Listing at Top
title_cn: 苹果供应商立讯精密计划香港上市定价最高
summary: Apple Inc. supplier Luxshare Precision Industry Co. is poised to raise HK$24.3 billion ($3.1 billion) after telling prospective investors it wants to price shares for its Hong Kong listing at the maximum amount it had set, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Fincantieri Speeds Subsea Buildout With Deals to Buy Four Firms
title_cn: 芬坎蒂尼集团收购四家公司加速海底建设
summary: Fincantieri SpA agreed to buy majority stakes in four underwater technology companies, boosting the Italian shipbuilder’s presence in a growing part of Europe’s military buildout.

title: Kioxia to Draw $18.5 Billion Inflows on Topix Review, SMBC Says
title_cn: SMBC 称 Kioxia 将在 Topix 审核中吸引 185 亿美元资金流入
summary: Kioxia Holdings Corp. shares may see passive inflows of ¥3 trillion ($18.5 billion), because of the potential jump in its weighting on the benchmark Topix index, according to SMBC Nikko Securities Inc.

title: Horizons Middle East & Africa 7/6/2026
title_cn: 中东和非洲地平线 7/6/2026
summary: Horizons Middle East & Africa is your daily spotlight on one of the world's fastest-growing regions. Live from Dubai, we bring you the latest global markets and analysis, plus news-making interviews, with a special focus on MEA. All that and more, as you head to the office in the Gulf, pause for lunch in Hong Kong, or start your day in London or Johannesburg.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Novartis to Buy Cancer-Drug Firm Myricx for Up to $1.5 Billion
title_cn: 诺华公司将以高达 15 亿美元的价格收购癌症药物公司 Myricx
summary: Novartis AG agreed to buy British biotech Myricx Bio for as much as $1.5 billion, adding an experimental cancer drug designed to deliver more potent treatments directly to tumors while limiting damage to healthy cells.

title: Nvidia AI Server Delay Report Sends Asian Tech Stocks Sliding
title_cn: Nvidia AI 服务器延迟报告导致亚洲科技股下滑
summary: Asian technology stocks slumped after a report that Nvidia Corp.’s next-generation AI server rack system has been delayed by more than a year due to manufacturing difficulties.

title: Korea Plans New Investment Fund Using Tax Windfall From AI
title_cn: 韩国计划利用人工智能带来的税收暴利设立新的投资基金
summary: South Korea is looking at creating an investment fund using excess tax revenue fueled by its burgeoning semiconductor sector to finance long-term economic growth, a senior government official said.

title: AI Job Disruption Has Come for Ireland's Technology Sector
title_cn: 人工智能对爱尔兰科技行业的就业造成干扰
summary: The country benefited from a jobs boom after attracting US multinationals, but some of these roles are being cut in the name of AI efficiency.

title: Rakuten Travel Xchange CEO on Japan's Tourism
title_cn: Rakuten Travel Xchange 首席执行官谈日本旅游业
summary:
James Park, CEO at Rakuten Travel Xchange, discusses the trends shaping Japan’s tourism market as inbound arrivals extended its decline in May, weighed down by reduced flights across routes and a prolonged slump in Chinese visitors. He speaks with Shery Ahn on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade."
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ByteDance, Alibaba Pull AI Companions as Beijing Tightens Rules
title_cn: 字节跳动、阿里巴巴撤回人工智能伙伴，北京收紧规则
summary: ByteDance Ltd. and Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. are pulling the plug on features that let users build and chat with AI companions, preparing for new Chinese regulations governing human interactions with artificial intelligence.

title: Self-Driving Startup Turing Gets AMD Backing, Adopts AMD GPUs
title_cn: 自动驾驶初创公司 Turing 获得 AMD 支持并采用 AMD GPU
summary: Self-driving tech developer Turing Inc. has added AMD Ventures to its list of backers and begun adopting Advanced Micro Devices Inc.’s AI accelerators in its systems.

title: Samsung Union Leader’s $26 Billion Bonus Victory Turns to Bitterness
title_cn: 三星工会领袖 260 亿美元奖金的胜利变成了苦涩
summary: Avoiding old-school labor ideology, a new generation of tech workers finds itself divided by the AI boom.

title: Netflix Viewers Are Abandoning Shows After One Season
title_cn: Netflix 观众在观看一季后就放弃观看剧集
summary: Netflix’s biggest hits are losing more than half of their audience after one season

title: Hyundai Motor Showcases Humanoid at World Cup in Robotics Push
title_cn: 现代汽车在机器人世界杯上展示人形机器人
summary: Hyundai Motor Co. showcased its Atlas humanoid robot at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, highlighting its technical progress on football’s biggest stage as the South Korean automaker gears up for mass production and factory deployment.

title: Why Europe Fears Trump’s Next Moves on NATO
title_cn: 为什么欧洲担心特朗普对北约的下一步行动
summary: US allies are bracing for unpleasant surprises at NATO’s annual summit in Ankara on July 7-8. President Donald Trump is still smarting from Europe’s reluctance to support his war in Iran, and has questioned why the US should continue to defend the continent when allies don’t reciprocate by supporting American interests.

title: Ukraine Says It Attacked Two Russia Oil Refineries Overnight
title_cn: 乌克兰称其连夜袭击了俄罗斯两家炼油厂
summary: Ukraine’s forces have hit two refineries — in central Russia and on the Baltic coast — in the latest in a series of attacks on energy infrastructure that are compounding a nationwide gasoline shortage.

title: Turkey Cracks Down on Press as NATO Leaders Descend on Ankara
title_cn: 北约领导人抵达安卡拉，土耳其打压媒体
summary: Turkish authorities are escalating a years-long crackdown against perceived critics in the run up to this week’s NATO summit in Ankara, in a show of intolerance toward dissent.

title: Germany Calls TKMS Bid to Build Canadian Submarines ‘Unbeatable’
title_cn: 德国称 TKMS 建造加拿大潜艇的投标“无与伦比”
summary: The German government voiced optimism that Canada will opt for a bid led by ThyssenKrupp Marine Systems to build a fleet of submarines in a deal worth tens of billions of dollars.

title: China Sentences Official to Death Over $325 Million in Bribes
title_cn: 中国判处受贿超过 3.25 亿美元的官员死刑
summary: A Chinese court handed a rare death sentence to a former official on corruption charges, in a severe punishment underscoring the intensity of President Xi Jinping’s anti-graft crackdown.

title: $2 Trillion Race to Control Future Battlefields
title_cn: 2万亿美元争夺未来战场控制权
summary: More than $2 trillion is being poured into the global arms race as nations attempt to be the first to master drones, hypersonic weapons, AI and other emerging technologies that may dominate future battlefields. Bloomberg's Gerry Doyle reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NATO’s Biggest Mission Is Keeping Trump Happy
title_cn: 北约最大的使命是让特朗普高兴
summary: Western defense alliance is beholden to what the US leader says and thinks.

title: Philippines Arrests Duterte-Allied Senator for Plunder Charge
title_cn: 菲律宾以掠夺罪名逮捕杜特尔特盟友参议员
summary: Philippine authorities arrested a senator charged with plunder, hours before the Senate started the impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte on Monday, in a move that may impact the vote in proceedings that could determine Duterte’s political future.

title: Europe Pledged to Rearm. How’s That Going?
title_cn: 欧洲承诺重新武装。怎么样？
summary: Russian expansionism and US plans to dial down involvement in NATO are forcing European nations to rebuild military capabilities that have atrophied since the Cold War.

title: China Holds Rare Test of Sub-Launched Missile in Pacific Ocean
title_cn: 中国在太平洋举行罕见的潜射导弹试验
summary: China test-fired a ballistic missile from a nuclear submarine in the Pacific Ocean, drawing criticism from Japan, New Zealand and Australia, and underscoring its efforts to project power in the region.

title: China Releases Pastor After Trump Raised Case With Xi
title_cn: 特朗普向习近平提出申诉后，中国释放牧师
summary: China has released the leader of a prominent underground church from detention in a conciliatory gesture after US President Donald Trump personally raised the case with Chinese leader Xi Jinping.

title: Russia Strike Exposes Ukraine Air Defense Gap Before NATO Summit
title_cn: 北约峰会前俄罗斯空袭暴露乌克兰防空缺口
summary: A deadly overnight attack on the eve of the NATO summit highlighted Kyiv’s growing vulnerability as shortages of US-made Patriot air defenses become acute and peace talks remain stalled.

title: Australia-Fiji Sign Security Deal, Expand China Containment
title_cn: 澳大利亚与斐济签署安全协议，扩大对华遏制
summary: Australia and Fiji signed a mutual defense treaty and a new agreement to develop ties, in a significant development in Canberra’s campaign to shore up its influence in the South Pacific and limit China’s influence.

title: Farage Denies Wrongdoing Over Gifts From Convicted Criminal
title_cn: 法拉奇否认对被定罪罪犯的礼物有不当行为
summary: Nigel Farage denied any wrongdoing over gifts he received from a convicted criminal, as pressure grows on the Reform UK leader over his finances.

title: President Trump Prepares for NATO Summit | Daybreak Europe 7/6/2026
title_cn: 特朗普总统为北约峰会做准备|欧洲黎明 7/6/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

On today's show, stocks in Asia pared gains as a rebound in technology stocks stalled. Investors cautious ahead of earnings from Samsung and SK Hynix ADRs listing in the US on Friday.

NATO leaders are due to convene at the military alliance's annual summit starting in Turkey on Tuesday. President Trump will meet Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy at the meeting in Ankara on Wednesday.

And EasyJet has agreed in principle to a takeover offer of more than £5 billion from Castlelake. The offer of £6.90 per share in cash was Castlelake’s fifth bid.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Russian Strike on Kyiv Kills 11 Ahead of NATO Summit
title_cn: 北约峰会前夕俄罗斯对基辅的袭击造成11人死亡
summary: Russia carried out a massive air attack on Ukraine a day before the leaders of NATO countries are set to meet for their annual summit. Eleven people were killed and 46 injured in the overnight strikes on Kyiv that caused damage in four districts of the city, according to a post on Telegram by Mayor Vitali Klitschko. Bloomberg's Anthony Halpin reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NATO Summit: What's at Stake for Erdogan?
title_cn: 北约峰会：埃尔多安的利害关系是什么？
summary: Turkey is hosting the 2026 NATO summit in the capital city of Ankara. Bloomberg's Flavia Krause-Jackson discusses what the alliance's gathering means for President Recep Tayyip Erdogan. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pound Defies Expectations as Traders Give Burnham a Chance
title_cn: 英镑超出预期，交易员给伯纳姆一个机会
summary: In a year of political and economic upheaval for the UK, the pound has emerged as an unlikely oasis of calm, wrong-footing traders who were betting on the currency to retreat at the first sign of trouble.

title: Trump Set to Travel to Turkey for NATO Meeting
title_cn: 特朗普将前往土耳其参加北约会议
summary: US President Donald Trump will arrive in Turkey on Tuesday to meet leader Recep Tayyip Erdogan before a NATO summit. Trump will also meet Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy at the defense alliance's gathering in Ankara. Bloomberg's Paul Wallace reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Uproar as FIFA Allows Balogun to Play After Trump Call
title_cn: 特朗普通话后国际足联允许巴洛贡比赛引发轩然大波
summary: FIFA cleared US star Folarin Balogun to play in a World Cup match against Belgium following a personal appeal by President Donald Trump, a rare suspension of an automatic punishment that sparked outrage among competing teams. Bloomberg's David Ingles and Yvonne Man discuss the latest developments in the sport. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sarah Ketterer's Contrarian Investment Playbook
title_cn: 莎拉·凯特勒的逆向投资手册
summary: AI can read every earnings report, filing and research note in seconds — but can it ever replace the instincts of a seasoned investor? Merryn Somerset Webb sits down with Causeway Capital Management chief executive Sarah Ketterer to explore where AI is genuinely changing fund management and why human judgment still matters. Ketterer also shares where she is finding value in today's markets, highlighting opportunities in healthcare, enterprise software, UK equities and overlooked Chinese companies while warning investors about the risks of chasing the AI semiconductor boom. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Vietnam Gambles on $4 Billion Port to Check China's Naval Power
title_cn: 越南豪掷40亿美元修建港口遏制中国海军力量
summary: The project in the south comes as concerns mount over Beijing’s influence in Cambodia, and its increasingly dominant position in the South China Sea.

title: Burnham Adviser Urges Next PM to Consider Radical Tax Overhaul
title_cn: 伯纳姆顾问敦促下一任总理考虑彻底的税收改革
summary: A group of economists including Andy Burnham adviser Jim O’Neill have called for a wide-ranging overhaul to turbocharge Britain’s sluggish economy, with the former Greater Manchester mayor set to take another step toward Downing Street later this week.

title: UK to Toughen Up Political Donation Rules in Latest Crackdown
title_cn: 英国将在最新的镇压行动中加强政治献金规则
summary: Political donors will need to wait a year after returning to the UK before they can give more than £100,000 ($133,510) as part of a proposed crackdown on offshore political finance that threatens to hit Nigel Farage’s Reform UK.

title: AI Poses Biggest Security Challenge of Decade, UK’s Cooper Warns
title_cn: 英国库珀警告称，人工智能带来了十年来最大的安全挑战
summary: The world must urgently develop guardrails to contain the threat posed by artificial intelligence, Britain’s foreign secretary is set to warn.

title: The $2 Trillion Race for Control of Future Battlefields
title_cn: 2万亿美元争夺未来战场控制权的竞赛
summary: Cold War-sized nuclear stockpiles are out. Emergent technologies like hypersonics, AI, space weapons and drones are in. World powers are betting big that getting there first will give them an insurmountable edge.

title: Trump Headed to NATO Summit to Meet Zelenskyy, Face Wary Allies
title_cn: 特朗普前往北约峰会会见泽伦斯基，面对警惕的盟友
summary: President Donald Trump will meet with Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy at a NATO summit in Turkey on Wednesday that will be charged with tension over the US leader’s views on Greenland, European defense spending and the Iran war.

title: Progressive Mallory McMorrow Suspends Michigan Senate Campaign
title_cn: 进步派马洛里·麦克莫罗暂停密歇根州参议院竞选活动
summary: State Senator Mallory McMorrow suspended her campaign for Michigan’s open Senate seat, setting up a two-person Democratic primary fight between Representative Haley Stevens and progressive Abdul El-Sayed.
